overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a dystopian video game (Half-Life: Alyx) showing a player walking through a foggy, neon-lit urban alley at night, entering a derelict industrial building, and approaching an elevator. The atmosphere is dark and cyberpunk-inspired with concrete architecture and volumetric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy back alley with debris and abandoned vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through a foggy alleyway past debris piles and a red pickup truck

entered.detail: rusted red pickup truck parked on the right side of the alley
tall concrete support pillars rising into the fog
scattered trash and rubble piled against the left wall
distant orange light source glowing through the fog

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow foggy alley at night, passing a red pickup truck on the right and debris piles on the left. Concrete pillars and distant industrial buildings are visible through the thick greenish fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban street with neon signage and building entrance

events.description: pink and blue neon signs become visible through the fog on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street toward a building entrance with glowing neon signs

entered.detail: vertical pink neon signs glowing on the right building facade
tall brutalist concrete building with small windows
dark doorway leading into the building ahead

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the narrow alley onto a wider street, passing the red truck and approaching a building entrance. Pink neon signs glow through the fog on the right as the player walks toward a covered entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict building interior with graffiti and scattered debris

events.description: entering the dark interior of the building from the foggy street

agents.ego_description: walking into a dark abandoned building through a doorway, navigating past debris

entered.detail: dark hallway leading deeper into the building
white spray-painted graffiti on the concrete walls
large yellow skull painted on the wall in the main room
empty metal storage racks along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the dark building interior, leaving the foggy street behind. The space is dimly lit with scattered debris on the floor and graffiti on the walls. A large yellow skull mural becomes visible on the right wall as the player moves through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator lobby with metal security gate and vending machine

events.description: stopping at the elevator doors and waiting for them to open
elevator doors open and player enters the elevator car

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator, waiting for the security gate to open, and entering the elevator car

entered.detail: metal accordion security gate with green neon X symbol above
illuminated vending machine with glowing buttons
digital panel showing floor selections for 01 STREET and 08 APARTMENTS

segments.scene_description: The player enters an elevator lobby area with a large metal security gate and a vending machine. The player approaches the elevator, the accordion doors open, and the player enters the elevator car to interact with the floor selection panel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a foggy, neon-lit urban alley into the dark, derelict interior of an industrial building. It begins by navigating a narrow passage filled with thick greenish fog, passing a red pickup truck and piles of debris beneath towering concrete pillars. As the camera moves onto a wider street, the atmosphere shifts with the glow of pink neon signs appearing through the haze before the view transitions into a dimly lit building entrance. The scene then opens into a gritty interior corridor where the fog vanishes, replaced by graffiti-covered walls and a large yellow skull mural. Finally, the camera advances through an elevator lobby past a metal security gate and a vending machine, ending as the accordion doors slide open to reveal the interior of an elevator car.
